# Phase-14 — Event-Driven Architecture & Integration

> Design decoupled, event-driven, and integration architectures.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 52-54**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Event-Driven Architecture](01_Event_Driven_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Event_Driven_Architecture.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 02 | [Microservices Architecture](02_Microservices_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Microservices_Architecture.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 03 | [CQRS](03_CQRS.prompt.md) | `CQRS.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 04 | [Event Sourcing](04_Event_Sourcing.prompt.md) | `Event_Sourcing.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 05 | [API Design: REST, GraphQL, gRPC](05_API_Design_REST_GraphQL_gRPC.prompt.md) | `API_Design.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 06 | [Enterprise Integration Patterns](06_Enterprise_Integration_Patterns.prompt.md) | `Enterprise_Integration_Patterns.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 07 | [Message Brokers and Queues](07_Message_Brokers_and_Queues.prompt.md) | `Message_Brokers_and_Queues.md` | 45 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
